base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ganon_death_triforce_reveal — a character (boss) from 1986 legend of zelda. Ganon death — 4-frame explosion reveals Triforce of Power piece. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Ganon death — 4-frame explosion reveals Triforce of Power piece; Link picks up to complete Triforce and rescue Zelda
